Description: For the raw data download on globus, users are not currently allowed to download the root directly, only the files one at a time. This makes downloading the entire dataset impossible. See the image below, where the download button is grayed out: ![image](https://github.com/OSU-NLP-Group/Mind2Web/assets/105821676/d8f766e3-909a-4149-b968-27a44733b1aa)  Also, its worth mentioning the delete button is not grayed out.   If this is user error, please let me know.  Thanks, Tyler
Discuss Information: Hi Tyler, thanks for reporting back! These might be the design of Globus. 1. Download the entire dataset For bulk download I think Globus provides the `transfer or sync` function, https://docs.globus.org/how-to/get-started/. `Download` seems to work only for individual files. Many research institutes have support for globus to transfer to their storage system, like OSC. Same as some cloud vendors, e.g., I used it to transfer data to AWS s3 before. Meanwhile you should also be able to launch your own globus endpoint and transfer to local system. Let me know if this works.  2. The delete button. Guest users only have `read` access. I just tested it, while the user can submit the delete request, it won't success and will hit permission error. But thanks for pointing this out!
